_publications._publicationTitle: Characterisation of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumours in neurofibromatosis-1 using heterogeneity analysis of

_contextSnippet: Good inter-observer agreement was found for measurement of all parameters with ICC varying from 0.86 (NGTDM contrast and GLCM contrast) to 1.0 (SUVmax and SUVpeak)
details: Good inter-observer agreement found for all parameters with ICC varying from 0.86 (NGTDM contrast and GLCM contrast) to 1.0 (SUVmax and SUVpeak) on 1.5-h and 4-h scans
